# Resto Night Website Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Build a single-page Astro website for Resto Night (Amiens snack/restaurant) with a Decap CMS admin so the manager can edit menu, hours, and contact info themselves; deploy on Netlify with custom domain support.

**Architecture:** Static site generated by Astro 5 from typed Markdown/JSON content collections. Decap CMS at `/admin` writes back to GitHub via Netlify Identity authentication. Netlify rebuilds on every commit. Mobile-first one-pager with dark vert-bouteille / neon-pink visual identity.

**Tech Stack:** Astro 5, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript, Zod (content validation), Vitest (unit tests), Decap CMS, Netlify Identity, Netlify hosting, GitHub.

**Spec:** [`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-28-resto-night-website-design.md`](../specs/2026-04-28-resto-night-website-design.md)

---

## File Structure

```
RestoNight/
├── src/
│   ├── content/

│   │   │   ├── general.md             ← singleton site infos (Task 5)
│   │   │   ├── hours.json             ← singleton schedule (Task 5)
│   │   │   └── delivery.json          ← singleton order links (Task 5)
│   │   ├── categories/                ← one .md per category (Task 5)
│   │   └── dishes/                    ← one .md per dish (Task 5)
│   ├── lib/

│   │   └── content.ts                 ← typed content loaders (Task 8)
│   ├── layouts/
│   │   └── Base.astro                 ← global layout, SEO, fonts (Task 9)
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── OpenBadge.astro            ← live "open now" badge (Task 10)
│   │   ├── Hero.astro                 ← hero section (Task 11)
│   │   ├── DishCard.astro             ← single dish card (Task 12)
│   │   ├── CategoryFilter.astro       ← sticky category chips (Task 13)
│   │   ├── MenuSection.astro          ← menu grouped + filtered (Task 14)
│   │   ├── OrderButtons.astro         ← Uber Eats / phone CTAs (Task 15)
│   │   ├── HoursWidget.astro          ← weekly schedule table (Task 16)
│   │   ├── ContactSection.astro       ← address, map, social (Task 17)
│   │   └── Footer.astro               ← legal + admin link (Task 18)
│   ├── pages/
│   │   └── index.astro                ← one-pager wiring (Task 19)
│   └── styles/
│       └── global.css                 ← Tailwind + custom palette + fonts (Task 2)
├── public/
│   ├── admin/
│   │   ├── index.html                 ← Decap CMS entrypoint (Task 20)
│   │   └── config.yml                 ← CMS schema (Task 21)
│   └── uploads/
│       └── .gitkeep
├── astro.config.mjs                   ← Task 1
├── tailwind.config.mjs                ← Task 2 (Tailwind 4 uses CSS but config for IDE)
├── tsconfig.json                      ← Task 1
├── vitest.config.ts                   ← Task 3
├── netlify.toml                       ← Task 22
├── package.json                       ← Task 1
└── .gitignore                         ← Task 1
```

**Files:**
- Create: `package.json`, `astro.config.mjs`, `tsconfig.json`, `.gitignore`
- Create: `src/pages/placeholder.astro` (temporary, replaced in Task 19)

Run:
```bash
cd "c:/Users/ilyas/Desktop/RestoNight"
npm init -y
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Install Astro and dev dependencies**

Run:
```bash
npm install astro@^5
npm install -D typescript @astrojs/check
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Write `astro.config.mjs`**

```js
import { defineConfig } from 'astro/config';

export default defineConfig({
  site: 'https://restonight.netlify.app',
  trailingSlash: 'never',
  build: {
    format: 'file',
  },
});
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Write `tsconfig.json`**

```json
{
  "extends": "astro/tsconfigs/strict",
  "include": ["src/**/*", ".astro/types.d.ts"],
  "exclude": ["dist", "node_modules"]
}
```

```
node_modules/
dist/
.astro/
.netlify/
.env
.env.local
*.log
.DS_Store
public/uploads/*
!public/uploads/.gitkeep
```

```css
@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap");
@import "tailwindcss";

@theme {
  --color-resto-green-deep: #0F2A1D;
  --color-resto-green: #1B4332;
  --color-resto-green-light: #2D5F3F;
  --color-resto-neon: #FF1B6B;
  --color-resto-neon-glow: #FF4D8A;
  --color-resto-orange: #F59E0B;
  --color-resto-cream: #FAF3E0;
  --color-resto-kraft: #C9A876;
  --color-resto-black: #0A0A0A;

  --font-display: "Bebas Neue", system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
}

@layer base {
  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    background-color: var(--color-resto-green-deep);
    color: var(--color-resto-cream);
    font-family: var(--font-body);
  }

  h1, h2, h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    *, *::before, *::after {
      animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
      animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
      transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
      scroll-behavior: auto !important;
    }
  }
}

@layer utilities {
  .neon-glow {
    text-shadow:
      0 0 8px var(--color-resto-neon),
      0 0 16px var(--color-resto-neon-glow),
      0 0 32px rgba(255, 27, 107, 0.4);
  }

  .pulse-neon {
    animation: pulse-neon 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes pulse-neon {
    0%, 100% { opacity: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--color-resto-neon), 0 0 16px var(--color-resto-neon-glow); }
    50% { opacity: 0.85; text-shadow: 0 0 16px var(--color-resto-neon), 0 0 32px var(--color-resto-neon-glow); }
  }

  .grain {
    position: relative;
  }
  .grain::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    opacity: 0.03;
    mix-blend-mode: overlay;
    background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='200' height='200'><filter id='n'><feTurbulence baseFrequency='0.9'/></filter><rect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/></svg>");
  }
}
```

## Task 4: Define content collection schemas (Zod)

**Files:**
- Create: `src/content/config.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the schemas**

Create `src/content/config.ts`:
```ts
import { defineCollection, z } from 'astro:content';

const general = defineCollection({
  type: 'content',
  schema: z.object({
    nom: z.string(),
    slogan: z.string(),
    telephone: z.string(),
    email: z.string().email().or(z.literal('')).optional(),
    adresse: z.string(),
    photo_devanture: z.string(),
    facebook_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).optional(),
    instagram_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).optional(),
    google_maps_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).optional(),
  }),
});

const hours = defineCollection({
  type: 'data',
  schema: z.object({
    schedule: z.record(
      z.enum(['lundi', 'mardi', 'mercredi', 'jeudi', 'vendredi', 'samedi', 'dimanche']),
      z.object({
        ferme: z.boolean(),
        ouverture: z.string().regex(/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/),
        fermeture: z.string().regex(/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/),
      }),
    ),
    fermetures_exceptionnelles: z.array(z.object({
      date: z.string().regex(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/),
      raison: z.string(),
    })).default([]),
  }),
});

const delivery = defineCollection({
  type: 'data',
  schema: z.object({
    uber_eats_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).default(''),
    deliveroo_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).default(''),
    just_eat_url: z.string().url().or(z.literal('')).default(''),
  }),
});

const categories = defineCollection({
  type: 'content',
  schema: z.object({
    nom: z.string(),
    ordre: z.number().int().min(0),
    emoji: z.string().optional(),
  }),
});

const dishes = defineCollection({
  type: 'content',
  schema: z.object({
    nom: z.string(),
    description: z.string().optional(),
    prix: z.number().min(0),
    categorie: z.string(),
    photo: z.string().optional(),
    tags: z.array(z.enum(['populaire', 'nouveau', 'epice', 'vege'])).default([]),
    disponible: z.boolean().default(true),
    variantes: z.array(z.object({
      nom: z.string(),
      prix: z.number().min(0),
    })).optional(),
  }),
});

export const collections = {
  general,
  hours,
  delivery,
  categories,
  dishes,
};
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify build still passes (no content yet, schemas should still load)**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: build succeeds (warns about empty collections is OK).

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "feat: define Zod schemas for content collections"
```

## Task 6: Write failing tests for `hours.ts` (TDD red phase)

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/hours.test.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the test file with all 8 unit cases**

Create `src/lib/hours.test.ts`:
```ts
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { computeOpenStatus, type Hours } from './hours';

const WEEKDAY_NIGHT: Hours = {
  schedule: {
    lundi:    { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    mardi:    { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    mercredi: { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    jeudi:    { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    vendredi: { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    samedi:   { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
    dimanche: { ferme: false, ouverture: '18:00', fermeture: '02:00' },
  },
  fermetures_exceptionnelles: [],
};

// Helper: build a Date for a given French weekday at HH:MM (local-equivalent UTC).
// We use a fixed reference week to avoid DST issues.
// 2026-04-27 is a Monday.
const dateAt = (dayOffset: number, hh: number, mm: number) => {
  const d = new Date(Date.UTC(2026, 3, 27 + dayOffset, hh, mm, 0));
  return d;
};

describe('computeOpenStatus', () => {
  it('Tuesday 19:00 with 18:00→02:00 schedule is open', () => {
    const result = computeOpenStatus(WEEKDAY_NIGHT, dateAt(1, 19, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('open');
  });

  it('Tuesday 01:30 (tail of Monday 18:00→02:00) is open', () => {
    const result = computeOpenStatus(WEEKDAY_NIGHT, dateAt(1, 1, 30));
    expect(result.status).toBe('open');
  });

  it('Tuesday 03:00 (after fermeture 02:00) is closed', () => {
    const result = computeOpenStatus(WEEKDAY_NIGHT, dateAt(1, 3, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('closed');
  });

  it('day with ferme=true is closed and proposes next opening', () => {
    const hours: Hours = {
      ...WEEKDAY_NIGHT,
      schedule: {
        ...WEEKDAY_NIGHT.schedule,
        mardi: { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
      },
    };
    const result = computeOpenStatus(hours, dateAt(1, 20, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('closed');
    if (result.status === 'closed' && 'opensAt' in result) {
      expect(result.opensAt).toBe('18:00');
    }
  });

  it('exceptional closure on current date returns reason exceptional', () => {
    const hours: Hours = {
      ...WEEKDAY_NIGHT,
      fermetures_exceptionnelles: [{ date: '2026-04-28', raison: 'Privatisation' }],
    };
    const result = computeOpenStatus(hours, dateAt(1, 20, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('closed');
    if (result.status === 'closed' && 'reason' in result && result.reason === 'exceptional') {
      expect(result.details).toBe('Privatisation');
    } else {
      throw new Error('expected exceptional closure');
    }
  });

  it('all days closed returns closed with no opensAt', () => {
    const hours: Hours = {
      schedule: {
        lundi:    { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        mardi:    { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        mercredi: { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        jeudi:    { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        vendredi: { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        samedi:   { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
        dimanche: { ferme: true, ouverture: '00:00', fermeture: '00:00' },
      },
      fermetures_exceptionnelles: [],
    };
    const result = computeOpenStatus(hours, dateAt(1, 20, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('closed');
    if (result.status === 'closed' && 'opensAt' in result) {
      expect(result.opensAt).toBeUndefined();
    }
  });

  it('exact opening time 18:00 is open', () => {
    const result = computeOpenStatus(WEEKDAY_NIGHT, dateAt(1, 18, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('open');
  });

  it('exact closing time 02:00 is closed', () => {
    const result = computeOpenStatus(WEEKDAY_NIGHT, dateAt(1, 2, 0));
    expect(result.status).toBe('closed');
  });
});
```

## Task 7: Implement `hours.ts` to make tests pass (TDD green phase)

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/hours.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the implementation**

Create `src/lib/hours.ts`:
```ts
export type Day =
  | 'lundi' | 'mardi' | 'mercredi' | 'jeudi'
  | 'vendredi' | 'samedi' | 'dimanche';

export interface DaySchedule {
  ferme: boolean;
  ouverture: string;
  fermeture: string;
}

export interface ExceptionalClosure {
  date: string;
  raison: string;
}

export interface Hours {
  schedule: Record<Day, DaySchedule>;
  fermetures_exceptionnelles: ExceptionalClosure[];
}

export type OpenStatus =
  | { status: 'open'; closesAt: string }
  | { status: 'closed'; reason: 'exceptional'; details: string }
  | { status: 'closed'; opensAt?: string; openDay?: Day };

const DAYS: Day[] = [
  'dimanche', 'lundi', 'mardi', 'mercredi',
  'jeudi', 'vendredi', 'samedi',
];

function dayFromDate(d: Date): Day {
  return DAYS[d.getUTCDay()]!;
}

function minutesOf(hhmm: string): number {
  const [h, m] = hhmm.split(':').map(Number);
  return h! * 60 + m!;
}

function isoDate(d: Date): string {
  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

function previousDay(day: Day): Day {
  const idx = DAYS.indexOf(day);
  return DAYS[(idx + 6) % 7]!;
}

export function computeOpenStatus(hours: Hours, now: Date): OpenStatus {
  // Rule 1: exceptional closure today
  const today = isoDate(now);
  const exceptional = hours.fermetures_exceptionnelles.find((e) => e.date === today);
  if (exceptional) {
    return { status: 'closed', reason: 'exceptional', details: exceptional.raison };
  }

  const todayDay = dayFromDate(now);
  const minutesNow = now.getUTCHours() * 60 + now.getUTCMinutes();
  const todaySched = hours.schedule[todayDay];

  // Window B: tail of yesterday's overnight slot
  const yesterdayDay = previousDay(todayDay);
  const yesterdaySched = hours.schedule[yesterdayDay];
  if (!yesterdaySched.ferme) {
    const yOpen = minutesOf(yesterdaySched.ouverture);
    const yClose = minutesOf(yesterdaySched.fermeture);
    const yesterdayCrossesMidnight = yClose < yOpen || yClose === yOpen;
    if (yesterdayCrossesMidnight && yClose > 0 && minutesNow < yClose) {
      return { status: 'open', closesAt: yesterdaySched.fermeture };
    }
  }

  // Window A: today's slot (possibly crossing midnight)
  if (!todaySched.ferme) {
    const open = minutesOf(todaySched.ouverture);
    const close = minutesOf(todaySched.fermeture);
    const crossesMidnight = close < open || close === open;
    if (crossesMidnight) {
      // Open if now >= open today
      if (minutesNow >= open) {
        return { status: 'open', closesAt: todaySched.fermeture };
      }
    } else {
      if (minutesNow >= open && minutesNow < close) {
        return { status: 'open', closesAt: todaySched.fermeture };
      }
    }
  }

  // Closed: find next opening within the next 7 days
  for (let offset = 0; offset < 7; offset++) {
    const candidateDate = new Date(now.getTime() + offset * 86400000);
    const candidateDay = dayFromDate(candidateDate);
    const candidateIso = isoDate(candidateDate);
    if (hours.fermetures_exceptionnelles.some((e) => e.date === candidateIso)) continue;
    const sched = hours.schedule[candidateDay];
    if (sched.ferme) continue;
    const candidateOpen = minutesOf(sched.ouverture);
    if (offset === 0 && minutesNow >= candidateOpen) continue;
    return { status: 'closed', opensAt: sched.ouverture, openDay: candidateDay };
  }

  return { status: 'closed' };
}
```

## Task 8: Implement content helpers `content.ts`

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/content.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the helpers**

Create `src/lib/content.ts`:
```ts
import { getCollection, getEntry } from 'astro:content';

export async function getGeneral() {
  const entry = await getEntry('general', 'general');
  if (!entry) throw new Error('Missing required content: general/general.md');
  return entry.data;
}

export async function getHours() {
  const entry = await getEntry('hours', 'hours');
  if (!entry) throw new Error('Missing required content: hours/hours.json');
  return entry.data;
}

export async function getDelivery() {
  const entry = await getEntry('delivery', 'delivery');
  if (!entry) throw new Error('Missing required content: delivery/delivery.json');
  return entry.data;
}

export async function getCategoriesSorted() {
  const all = await getCollection('categories');
  return all.sort((a, b) => a.data.ordre - b.data.ordre);
}

export async function getDishesAvailable() {
  const all = await getCollection('dishes');
  return all.filter((d) => d.data.disponible !== false);
}

export async function getDishesByCategory() {
  const [categories, dishes] = await Promise.all([
    getCategoriesSorted(),
    getDishesAvailable(),
  ]);
  return categories.map((cat) => ({
    category: cat,
    dishes: dishes.filter((d) => d.data.categorie === cat.id),
  }));
}
```

```astro
import "../styles/global.css";
import { getGeneral, getHours } from "../lib/content";

interface Props {
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
}

const { title, description } = Astro.props;
const general = await getGeneral();
const hoursData = await getHours();

const siteTitle = title ?? `${general.nom} — Snack à Amiens, ouvert jusqu'à 02h`;
const siteDescription = description ?? `${general.nom} — ${general.slogan}. ${general.adresse}. Tacos, kebabs, burgers à Amiens.`;
const canonical = new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site).toString();

const jsonLd = {
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Restaurant",
  name: general.nom,
  description: general.slogan,
  telephone: general.telephone,
  address: {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    streetAddress: "34 Rue du Hocquet",
    addressLocality: "Amiens",
    postalCode: "80000",
    addressCountry: "FR",
  },
  url: canonical,
  servesCuisine: ["Tacos", "Burgers", "Kebabs", "Fast Food"],
  priceRange: "1-10€",
  openingHoursSpecification: Object.entries(hoursData.schedule)
    .filter(([, s]) => !s.ferme)
    .map(([day, s]) => ({
      "@type": "OpeningHoursSpecification",
      dayOfWeek: day.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + day.slice(1),
      opens: s.ouverture,
      closes: s.fermeture,
    })),
};

    <meta charset="utf-8" />

    <meta name="theme-color" content="#0F2A1D" />
    <title>{siteTitle}</title>

    <meta property="og:description" content={siteDescription} />
    <meta property="og:type" content="restaurant" />
    <meta property="og:url" content={canonical} />
    <meta property="og:image" content={new URL(general.photo_devanture, Astro.site).toString()} />
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />

    <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml" />

    <script type="application/ld+json" set:html={JSON.stringify(jsonLd)} />
  </head>
  <body class="grain bg-resto-green-deep text-resto-cream antialiased">
    <slot />
  </body>
</html>
```

## Task 10: Build `OpenBadge.astro` (live open/closed badge)

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/OpenBadge.astro`

The badge must update live in the visitor's browser based on local time. Render placeholder content server-side, then upgrade with a small inline `<script>`.

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the component**

Create `src/components/OpenBadge.astro`:
```astro
---
import { getHours } from "../lib/content";
import { computeOpenStatus } from "../lib/hours";

const hoursData = await getHours();
// Initial server-rendered state (will be overridden client-side)
const initial = computeOpenStatus(hoursData, new Date());
const initialLabel = initial.status === 'open' ? 'OUVERT' : 'FERMÉ';
const initialDetail = initial.status === 'open'
  ? `Ferme à ${initial.closesAt}`
  : (initial.status === 'closed' && 'reason' in initial && initial.reason === 'exceptional')
    ? initial.details
    : (initial.status === 'closed' && 'opensAt' in initial && initial.opensAt)
      ? `Ouvre ${initial.openDay} à ${initial.opensAt}`
      : 'Fermé';
---
<div
  id="open-badge"
  class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-resto-green-light/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-resto-neon/30"
  data-hours={JSON.stringify(hoursData)}
>
  <span
    id="open-badge-dot"
    class:list={[
      'w-2 h-2 rounded-full',
      initial.status === 'open' ? 'bg-resto-neon pulse-neon' : 'bg-resto-cream/50',
    ]}
  ></span>
  <span id="open-badge-label" class="font-display text-lg tracking-wider text-resto-neon neon-glow">
    {initialLabel}
  </span>
  <span id="open-badge-detail" class="text-xs text-resto-cream/70 hidden sm:inline">
    {initialDetail}
  </span>
</div>

<script>
  import { computeOpenStatus, type Hours } from "../lib/hours";

  function update() {
    const root = document.getElementById('open-badge');
    if (!root) return;
    const hours = JSON.parse(root.dataset.hours!) as Hours;
    const status = computeOpenStatus(hours, new Date());
    const dot = document.getElementById('open-badge-dot')!;
    const label = document.getElementById('open-badge-label')!;
    const detail = document.getElementById('open-badge-detail')!;

    if (status.status === 'open') {
      label.textContent = 'OUVERT';
      label.className = 'font-display text-lg tracking-wider text-resto-neon neon-glow';
      dot.className = 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-resto-neon pulse-neon';
      detail.textContent = `Ferme à ${status.closesAt}`;
    } else {
      label.textContent = 'FERMÉ';
      label.className = 'font-display text-lg tracking-wider text-resto-cream/80';
      dot.className = 'w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-resto-cream/50';
      if ('reason' in status && status.reason === 'exceptional') {
        detail.textContent = status.details;
      } else if ('opensAt' in status && status.opensAt) {
        detail.textContent = `Ouvre ${status.openDay} à ${status.opensAt}`;
      } else {
        detail.textContent = 'Fermé';
      }
    }
  }

  update();
  setInterval(update, 60_000); // refresh every minute
</script>
```

```astro
import type { CollectionEntry } from "astro:content";

interface Props {
  dish: CollectionEntry<"dishes">;
}

const { dish } = Astro.props;
const { nom, description, prix, photo, tags, variantes } = dish.data;

const TAG_LABELS: Record<string, { label: string; emoji: string }> = {
  populaire: { label: 'Populaire', emoji: '⭐' },
  nouveau:   { label: 'Nouveau',   emoji: '🆕' },
  epice:     { label: 'Épicé',     emoji: '🌶️' },
  vege:      { label: 'Végé',      emoji: '🥦' },
};
---
<article class="group bg-resto-green border border-resto-green-light rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-resto-neon/20 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300">
  {photo ? (
    <div class="aspect-square overflow-hidden bg-resto-black">
      <img
        src={photo}
        alt={nom}
        loading="lazy"
        class="w-full h-full object-cover saturate-[0.85] group-hover:saturate-100 transition"
      />
    </div>
  ) : (
    <div class="aspect-square bg-resto-kraft/20 flex items-center justify-center">
      <span class="text-6xl opacity-40">🍽️</span>
    </div>
  )}

  <div class="p-5">
    <div class="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 mb-2">
      <h3 class="font-display text-2xl tracking-wide leading-tight">{nom}</h3>
    </div>

    {description && (
      <p class="text-sm text-resto-cream/70 mb-4 line-clamp-2">{description}</p>
    )}

    {tags.length > 0 && (
      <div class="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mb-4">
        {tags.map((t) => (
          <span class="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-resto-black/40 text-resto-cream/80">
            {TAG_LABELS[t].emoji} {TAG_LABELS[t].label}
          </span>
        ))}
      </div>
    )}

    {variantes && variantes.length > 0 ? (
      <div class="flex gap-3 flex-wrap">
        {variantes.map((v) => (
          <div class="flex items-baseline gap-1">
            <span class="text-xs text-resto-cream/60">{v.nom}</span>
            <span class="font-display text-2xl text-resto-orange">
              {v.prix.toFixed(2)}€
            </span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    ) : (
      <div class="font-display text-3xl text-resto-orange">
        {prix.toFixed(2)}€
      </div>
    )}
  </div>
</article>
```

Create `src/components/CategoryFilter.astro`:
```astro
---
import type { CollectionEntry } from "astro:content";

interface Props {
  categories: CollectionEntry<"categories">[];
}

const { categories } = Astro.props;
---
<div
  id="category-filter"
  class="sticky top-0 z-30 bg-resto-green-deep/95 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-resto-green-light py-3"
>
  <div class="overflow-x-auto px-4 -mx-4">
    <ul class="flex gap-2 w-max">
      <li>
        <button
          type="button"
          data-category="all"
          class="cat-chip px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-resto-neon text-white font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition"
        >
          Tout
        </button>
      </li>
      {categories.map((cat) => (
        <li>
          <button
            type="button"
            data-category={cat.id}
            class="cat-chip px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-resto-green-light/50 text-resto-cream font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap hover:bg-resto-green-light transition"
          >
            {cat.data.emoji ?? ''} {cat.data.nom}
          </button>
        </li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  const chips = document.querySelectorAll<HTMLButtonElement>('.cat-chip');
  chips.forEach((chip) => {
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const cat = chip.dataset.category!;
      // Toggle active styles
      chips.forEach((c) => {
        c.classList.remove('bg-resto-neon', 'text-white');
        c.classList.add('bg-resto-green-light/50', 'text-resto-cream');
      });
      chip.classList.remove('bg-resto-green-light/50', 'text-resto-cream');
      chip.classList.add('bg-resto-neon', 'text-white');
      // Show/hide category sections
      document.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>('[data-category-section]').forEach((sec) => {
        const match = cat === 'all' || sec.dataset.categorySection === cat;
        sec.style.display = match ? '' : 'none';
      });
    });
  });
</script>
```

```astro
const general = await getGeneral();

const buttons = [
  delivery.uber_eats_url ? { label: 'Uber Eats', url: delivery.uber_eats_url, emoji: '🛵', color: 'bg-[#06C167]' } : null,
  delivery.deliveroo_url ? { label: 'Deliveroo', url: delivery.deliveroo_url, emoji: '🚲', color: 'bg-[#00CCBC]' } : null,
  delivery.just_eat_url  ? { label: 'Just Eat',  url: delivery.just_eat_url,  emoji: '🥡', color: 'bg-[#FF8000]' } : null,
].filter(Boolean) as { label: string; url: string; emoji: string; color: string }[];
---
<section id="commander" class="py-16 md:py-24 bg-resto-green">
  <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-4 text-center">
    <h2 class="font-display text-5xl md:text-7xl text-resto-neon neon-glow mb-4">
      COMMANDER
    </h2>
    <p class="text-resto-cream/70 mb-10">
      Sur place, à emporter ou livré chez toi.
    </p>

    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
      <a
        href={`tel:${general.telephone}`}
        class="px-6 py-6 bg-resto-neon text-white font-display text-3xl tracking-wider rounded-2xl hover:bg-resto-neon-glow transition shadow-xl shadow-resto-neon/30 flex items-center justify-center gap-3"
      >
        📞 APPELER
      </a>

      {buttons.map((b) => (
        <a
          href={b.url}
          target="_blank"
          rel="noopener noreferrer"
          class={`px-6 py-6 ${b.color} text-white font-display text-3xl tracking-wider rounded-2xl hover:opacity-90 transition shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-3`}
        >
          {b.emoji} {b.label.toUpperCase()}
        </a>
      ))}
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add src/components/OrderButtons.astro
git commit -m "feat: add OrderButtons section"
```

## Task 16: Build `HoursWidget.astro`

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/HoursWidget.astro`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the component**

Create `src/components/HoursWidget.astro`:
```astro
---
import { getHours } from "../lib/content";

const hoursData = await getHours();
const order: Array<keyof typeof hoursData.schedule> = [
  'lundi', 'mardi', 'mercredi', 'jeudi', 'vendredi', 'samedi', 'dimanche',
];

const todayIso = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
const todayException = hoursData.fermetures_exceptionnelles.find((e) => e.date === todayIso);
---
<div class="bg-resto-green-light/30 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-resto-green-light">
  <h3 class="font-display text-3xl text-resto-orange mb-4">HORAIRES</h3>

  {todayException && (
    <div class="mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg bg-resto-neon/20 border border-resto-neon text-resto-neon text-sm">
      ⚠️ Fermé exceptionnellement aujourd'hui : {todayException.raison}
    </div>
  )}

  <ul class="divide-y divide-resto-green-light">
    {order.map((day) => {
      const s = hoursData.schedule[day];
      return (
        <li class="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
          <span class="capitalize text-resto-cream/90">{day}</span>
          <span class="font-mono text-resto-cream/70">
            {s.ferme ? 'Fermé' : `${s.ouverture} – ${s.fermeture}`}
          </span>
        </li>
      );
    })}
  </ul>

  {hoursData.fermetures_exceptionnelles.length > 0 && (
    <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-resto-green-light">
      <h4 class="text-sm text-resto-cream/60 mb-2">Fermetures à venir</h4>
      <ul class="text-sm space-y-1">
        {hoursData.fermetures_exceptionnelles
          .filter((e) => e.date >= todayIso)
          .map((e) => (
            <li class="text-resto-cream/80">{e.date} — {e.raison}</li>
          ))}
      </ul>
    </div>
  )}
</div>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Commit**

```bash
git add src/components/HoursWidget.astro
git commit -m "feat: add HoursWidget with exceptional closure banner"
```

## Task 17: Build `ContactSection.astro`

**Files:**

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the component**

Create `src/components/ContactSection.astro`:
```astro
---
import { getGeneral } from "../lib/content";
import HoursWidget from "./HoursWidget.astro";

const general = await getGeneral();
const mapEmbed = `https://www.google.com/maps?q=${encodeURIComponent(general.adresse)}&output=embed`;
---
<section id="contact" class="py-16 md:py-24 bg-resto-green-deep">
  <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4">
    <h2 class="font-display text-5xl md:text-7xl text-resto-neon neon-glow text-center mb-12">
      OÙ NOUS TROUVER
    </h2>

    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
      <div class="space-y-6">
        <HoursWidget />

        <div class="bg-resto-green-light/30 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-resto-green-light">
          <h3 class="font-display text-3xl text-resto-orange mb-4">CONTACT</h3>
          <ul class="space-y-3">
            <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
              <span class="text-resto-neon">📍</span>
              <span>{general.adresse}</span>
            </li>
            <li>
              <a href={`tel:${general.telephone}`} class="flex items-center gap-3 hover:text-resto-neon transition">
                <span class="text-resto-neon">📞</span>
                <span>{general.telephone}</span>
              </a>
            </li>
            {general.email && (
              <li>
                <a href={`mailto:${general.email}`} class="flex items-center gap-3 hover:text-resto-neon transition">
                  <span class="text-resto-neon">✉️</span>
                  <span>{general.email}</span>
                </a>
              </li>
            )}
            {general.facebook_url && (
              <li>
                <a href={general.facebook_url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="flex items-center gap-3 hover:text-resto-neon transition">
                  <span class="text-resto-neon">📘</span>
                  <span>Facebook</span>
                </a>
              </li>
            )}
            {general.instagram_url && (
              <li>
                <a href={general.instagram_url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="flex items-center gap-3 hover:text-resto-neon transition">
                  <span class="text-resto-neon">📸</span>
                  <span>Instagram</span>
                </a>
              </li>
            )}
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-resto-green-light min-h-[400px]">
        <iframe
          src={mapEmbed}
          class="w-full h-full min-h-[400px]"
          loading="lazy"
          referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
          title="Localisation Resto Night"
        ></iframe>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

## Task 21: Configure Decap CMS (`config.yml`)

**Files:**
- Create: `public/admin/config.yml`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the CMS configuration**

Create `public/admin/config.yml`:
```yaml
backend:
  name: git-gateway
  branch: main

publish_mode: simple
media_folder: "public/uploads"
public_folder: "/uploads"
locale: "fr"
site_url: https://restonight.netlify.app
display_url: https://restonight.netlify.app
logo_url: /favicon.svg

collections:
  - name: "general"
    label: "Infos générales"
    delete: false
    files:
      - file: "src/content/general/general.md"
        label: "Infos du restaurant"
        name: "general"
        fields:
          - { label: "Nom", name: "nom", widget: "string" }
          - { label: "Slogan", name: "slogan", widget: "string" }
          - { label: "Téléphone", name: "telephone", widget: "string", hint: "Format : 0322470183 (sans espaces)" }
          - { label: "Email", name: "email", widget: "string", required: false }
          - { label: "Adresse", name: "adresse", widget: "string" }
          - { label: "Photo de la devanture", name: "photo_devanture", widget: "image" }
          - { label: "URL Facebook", name: "facebook_url", widget: "string", required: false }
          - { label: "URL Instagram", name: "instagram_url", widget: "string", required: false }
          - { label: "URL Google Maps", name: "google_maps_url", widget: "string", required: false }

  - name: "hours"
    label: "Horaires"
    delete: false
    files:
      - file: "src/content/hours/hours.json"
        label: "Horaires d'ouverture"
        name: "hours"
        fields:
          - label: "Horaires de la semaine"
            name: "schedule"
            widget: "object"
            fields:
              - label: "Lundi"
                name: "lundi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Mardi"
                name: "mardi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Mercredi"
                name: "mercredi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Jeudi"
                name: "jeudi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Vendredi"
                name: "vendredi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Samedi"
                name: "samedi"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
              - label: "Dimanche"
                name: "dimanche"
                widget: "object"
                fields:
                  - { label: "Fermé", name: "ferme", widget: "boolean", default: false }
                  - { label: "Ouverture", name: "ouverture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
                  - { label: "Fermeture", name: "fermeture", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{2}:\d{2}$', 'Format HH:MM'] }
          - label: "Fermetures exceptionnelles"
            name: "fermetures_exceptionnelles"
            widget: "list"
            required: false
            fields:
              - { label: "Date (AAAA-MM-JJ)", name: "date", widget: "string", pattern: ['^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$', 'Format AAAA-MM-JJ'] }
              - { label: "Raison", name: "raison", widget: "string" }

  - name: "delivery"
    label: "Liens de commande"
    delete: false
    files:
      - file: "src/content/delivery/delivery.json"
        label: "Liens de commande externe"
        name: "delivery"
        fields:
          - { label: "URL Uber Eats", name: "uber_eats_url", widget: "string", required: false }
          - { label: "URL Deliveroo", name: "deliveroo_url", widget: "string", required: false }
          - { label: "URL Just Eat", name: "just_eat_url", widget: "string", required: false }

  - name: "categories"
    label: "Catégories du menu"
    label_singular: "Catégorie"
    folder: "src/content/categories"
    create: true
    slug: "{{slug}}"
    extension: "md"
    format: "frontmatter"
    fields:
      - { label: "Nom", name: "nom", widget: "string" }
      - { label: "Ordre d'affichage", name: "ordre", widget: "number", value_type: "int", min: 0 }
      - { label: "Emoji (optionnel)", name: "emoji", widget: "string", required: false }

  - name: "dishes"
    label: "Plats"
    label_singular: "Plat"
    folder: "src/content/dishes"
    create: true
    slug: "{{slug}}"
    extension: "md"
    format: "frontmatter"
    fields:
      - { label: "Nom du plat", name: "nom", widget: "string" }
      - { label: "Description", name: "description", widget: "text", required: false }
      - { label: "Prix (€)", name: "prix", widget: "number", value_type: "float", min: 0, step: 0.10 }
      - label: "Catégorie"
        name: "categorie"
        widget: "relation"
        collection: "categories"
        search_fields: ["nom"]
        value_field: "{{slug}}"
        display_fields: ["nom"]
      - { label: "Photo", name: "photo", widget: "image", required: false }
      - label: "Tags"
        name: "tags"
        widget: "select"
        multiple: true
        required: false
        options:
          - { label: "⭐ Populaire", value: "populaire" }
          - { label: "🆕 Nouveau",   value: "nouveau" }
          - { label: "🌶️ Épicé",    value: "epice" }
          - { label: "🥦 Végé",      value: "vege" }
      - { label: "Disponible (sinon masqué du site)", name: "disponible", widget: "boolean", default: true }
      - label: "Variantes (L/XL etc., optionnel)"
        name: "variantes"
        widget: "list"
        required: false
        fields:
          - { label: "Nom de la variante", name: "nom", widget: "string" }
          - { label: "Prix de la variante (€)", name: "prix", widget: "number", value_type: "float", min: 0, step: 0.10 }
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify YAML parses**

Run: `node -e "console.log(require('fs').readFileSync('public/admin/config.yml','utf8').length, 'bytes')"`
Expected: prints byte count, no error.

## Task 22: Configure Netlify (build, redirects, Identity widget)

**Files:**
- Create: `netlify.toml`
- Modify: `src/layouts/Base.astro` (inject Netlify Identity widget)

- [ ] **Step 1: Create `netlify.toml`**

Create `netlify.toml` at repo root:
```toml
[build]
  command = "npm run build"
  publish = "dist"

[build.environment]
  NODE_VERSION = "20"

[[headers]]
  for = "/*"
  [headers.values]
    X-Frame-Options = "DENY"
    X-Content-Type-Options = "nosniff"
    Referrer-Policy = "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"

[[headers]]
  for = "/admin/*"
  [headers.values]
    X-Frame-Options = "SAMEORIGIN"

[[redirects]]
  from = "/admin"
  to = "/admin/"
  status = 301
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Inject Netlify Identity widget into `Base.astro`**

Edit `src/layouts/Base.astro` — add inside `<head>`, just before the closing `</head>`:
```astro
    <script src="https://identity.netlify.com/v1/netlify-identity-widget.js" is:inline></script>
    <script is:inline>
      if (window.netlifyIdentity) {
        window.netlifyIdentity.on("init", (user) => {
          if (!user) {
            window.netlifyIdentity.on("login", () => {
              document.location.href = "/admin/";
            });
          }
        });
      }
    </script>
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Run build to confirm config is picked up**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: succeeds.

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add netlify.toml src/layouts/Base.astro
git commit -m "feat: add Netlify config and Identity widget for CMS auth"
```

```js
  site: 'https://restonight.netlify.app',
  trailingSlash: 'never',
  build: { format: 'file' },
  integrations: [sitemap()],
  vite: {

});
```

## Task 24: Final smoke + Lighthouse pass + push to GitHub/Netlify

**Files:** none modified.

- [ ] **Step 1: Run all tests**

Run: `npm test`
Expected: 8 passing on `hours.test.ts`.

- [ ] **Step 2: Run type check**

Run: `npm run check`
Expected: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

- [ ] **Step 3: Run dev server and manually walk the golden path**

Run: `npm run dev`
Open `http://localhost:4321/`. Verify:
- Hero loads with photo background and OUVERT/FERMÉ badge
- Click "VOIR LE MENU" → smooth scroll to menu
- Click a category chip → only that category shows
- Click "Tout" → all categories visible again
- Click an Uber Eats button → opens new tab to Uber Eats
- Click phone number → triggers `tel:` (in dev tools, confirm `href="tel:0322470183"`)
- Click `/admin/` link in footer → 404 in dev (normal — needs Netlify Identity, will work in prod)
- Resize to mobile (375px) → layout adapts, no horizontal scroll
- Stop dev server.

- [ ] **Step 4: Run production build and preview**

Run: `npm run build && npm run preview`
Expected: site works at the preview URL, no build errors.

- [ ] **Step 5: Run Lighthouse manually (Chrome DevTools)**

Open the preview URL in Chrome → DevTools → Lighthouse tab → Mobile + Performance/A11y/Best/SEO → Generate report.
Expected: Performance ≥ 90, Accessibility ≥ 95, Best Practices ≥ 95, SEO ≥ 95.

If any score is below target, identify the lowest item, fix it, and re-run. Common issues:
- Missing alt text → add to remaining images
- Color contrast → bump cream to pure white where needed
- Missing meta description → already in Base.astro, verify it renders
- Font loading layout shift → add `<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">`

Stop preview.

- [ ] **Step 6: Push to GitHub**

```bash
gh repo create restonight --public --source=. --remote=origin --push
```

(Or manually: create empty repo on GitHub, then `git remote add origin <url> && git push -u origin main`.)

- [ ] **Step 7: Connect to Netlify**

Manual steps (one-time):
1. Sign in to https://app.netlify.com
2. "Add new site" → "Import an existing project" → select `restonight` repo
3. Build command auto-detected from `netlify.toml`
4. Deploy
5. Once deployed, go to "Site settings" → "Identity" → enable
6. "Identity" → "Registration" → set to "Invite only"
7. "Identity" → "Services" → enable "Git Gateway"
8. "Identity" → "Invite users" → invite the manager's email
9. Manager confirms email, sets password, logs in at `restonight.netlify.app/admin/`

- [ ] **Step 8: End-to-end CMS smoke test**

After invite is accepted:
1. Manager logs into `/admin/`
2. Edits the `Slogan` field in "Infos générales"
3. Clicks Publish
4. Wait ~30 s for Netlify to rebuild
5. Refresh the home page → new slogan visible

- [ ] **Step 9: Final commit and tag v1**

```bash
git tag v1.0.0
git push --tags
```

- [ ] **Step 10: Document handoff**

Create `HANDOFF.md`:
```markdown
# Resto Night — Handoff

Site URL: https://restonight.netlify.app
Admin URL: https://restonight.netlify.app/admin/

## Pour le gérant
- Aller sur l'URL admin, se connecter avec l'email invité
- Modifier menu, horaires, photos depuis l'interface
- Cliquer "Publish now" → site mis à jour en ~30 secondes

## Pour la maintenance technique
- Repo : github.com/<your-handle>/restonight
- Build local : `npm install && npm run dev`
- Tests : `npm test`
- Type check : `npm run check`
- Déploiement : automatique à chaque push sur `main`

## Troubleshooting
- Build qui échoue : voir Netlify deploy logs
- Gérant ne peut pas se connecter : vérifier Identity → Users dans Netlify
- Photo trop lourde : Astro l'optimise au build, mais < 2 MB recommandé en upload
```

Run:
```bash
git add HANDOFF.md
git commit -m "docs: add handoff guide"
git push
```
